_meta.notes: Seed list. category 0 = ok (implicit, not listed). category 1 = known malicious/phishing — HARD BLOCK. category 2 = sensitive auth surface (banking/health/gov auth) — HARD BLOCK from the extension; user must visit in a regular tab. category 3 = high-friction (adult/gambling/crypto-exchange) — force confirm every action. Domains are matched as suffix matches: a domain entry 'foo.com' matches 'foo.com', 'www.foo.com', 'login.foo.com', etc. Refresh via ~/scripts/refresh_domain_classes.sh; weekly via the maintenance window timer.

category_1.phishing-example.test: Reserved test domain used by classifier unit tests.
